title: Uncertainty-Aware Short-Horizon Warning of Large-Inclination Exceedance in Small Fishing Vessels: code and data
description: Source code (the jmse Python package: data curation with recomputed GM/GZ, leakage-safe embargoed windowing, a seven-model forecasting benchmark, three uncertainty-quantification methods with conformal recalibration, a probabilistic large-inclination-exceedance early-warning decision layer with a learning-free domain-rule baseline and a k-of-n hysteresis/evidence-accumulation sweep, leave-one-out generalization folds over sea state, vessel tonnage, and wave-phase realization, a clamped-vs-unclamped metacentric-height study, and a closed-form target-representation error-propagation analysis), the MATLAB/MSS simulation-generation scripts (six wave-phase realizations per condition and an unclamped-GM variant), experiment configurations, the processed dataset, and the test suite supporting the JMSE manuscript of the same title. Reproduces the manuscript's tables (T1-T22) and figures (F2-F14).
